description:
After visiting every country in Europe (most of them 3+ times), I have finally compiled a list of my favorite and least favorite nations on the continent - and why!  Please note that this video is SUBJECTIVE and based entirely off my own personal travel experiences. I'd love to hear your thoughts - do you agree or disagree with my list? Comment down below!

#europe #travel #culture 

✅  Don't forget to SUBSCRIBE to my channel by clicking here ➞   https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC0Ize0RLIbGdH5x4wI45G-A

▶️ Watch my favorite videos ➞ https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLhiP3P44ul3Y8LDbhXJmhVsVWcpe-7O4O

Thank you to ElevenLabs for dubbing my videos into Spanish, French, Portuguese, German and Arabic! If you want to learn more about their amazing technology, click this link: https://elevenlabs.io/drew_binsky

I wrote a book called JUST GO, with exclusive travel stories & tips to inspire you on your next adventures! Grab it on Amazon: https://shorturl.at/6biKO

FIND ME ON:
► INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/drewbinsky/
► TIK TOK: https://www.tiktok.com/@drewbinsky
► FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/drewbinsky/ 
► YOUTUBE 2ND CHANNEL: https://rb.gy/a65sj

👨🏻‍🦰 WHO AM I? 
I'm Drew Binsky and I have been to EVERY country in the world (197/197).  I make documentaries about interesting people and cultures in faraway places.  My ultimate goal is to inspire you to travel because I think it's the best education that you can get.  And our planet is beautiful!

MOST POPULAR YOUTUBE VIDEOS:
► He Is The Ice Man: http://y2u.be/VF8dkjEdKNo
► Tallest Humans on Earth: http://y2u.be/u03kNQNclGY
► He Hasn't Slept Since 1962: http://y2u.be/EDx1JvPEtxs
► 3 Things You Can't Do in North Korea: http://y2u.be/mNsx0Nqryos
► Why is Everything Free in Pakistan?: http://y2u.be/CWeWxl7ruGE

🙏 GET IN TOUCH!
► Website: https://world.drewbinsky.com/
► Email: partnerships@drewbinsky.com
